contract: interview transcript summary, web footprint findings, business identity, confirmed facts, unverified claims, missing answers, no build output

artifact.summary: Phase 0 DISCOVER for Captains Fish and Chicken (1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402). Fresh 5-source web-footprint sweep completed; owner/operator confirmed the full priced menu and four build decisions. NAP, owner, opening, and menu are high-confidence. Identity values (domain/email/GA4) to be provided by owner. Single-location scope; the 3100 6th St SW location is explicitly excluded.
artifact.interviewSummary: Operator (acting for owner Ray Aqel) reviewed the sweep and made four decisions: (1) MENU — provided the current menu with prices and descriptions directly, making it owner-confirmed (supersedes aggregator capture); prices may ship. (2) IDENTITY — will provide real domain, business email, and GA4 measurement ID (pending). (3) CONTACT — call-only, no lead form; primary phone (319) 221-1040; no SMS/text line fabricated. (4) SOCIAL PROOF — approved citing Google rating 4.4 (208 reviews) with attribution; positioning 'Fish, Chicken & Seafood — made fresh to order'. Hours remain unofficial pending owner confirmation. Dine-in/curbside service attributes remain unconfirmed; takeout + delivery (DoorDash/Uber Eats/Grubhub) and family/party catering are supported by confirmed evidence.

findings: NAP high-confidence: Captains Fish and Chicken, 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, (319) 221-1040
Owner Ray Aqel; prior fish-chicken restaurants in MN/IL/MI; first Iowa location
Opened October 2024 in the former Brick City Grill space
Full fried fish + chicken + wings + seafood + sides menu confirmed with prices (owner paste)
Ordering on DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Seamless, Postmates (CTAs, not pages)
Facebook is the only owned web presence; no dedicated domain exists
discrepancies: Hours: res-discover (unofficial) shows Sun 11-8 / Mon-Thu 11-10 / Fri-Sat 11-11; search text hinted ~9:40pm close some days; no official source — owner to confirm
Category varies by directory (Soul Food / Fast Food / Seafood / American) — positioning chosen as 'Fish, Chicken & Seafood'
Menu-price provenance was aggregator until owner supplied confirmed prices on 2026-07-07 (now resolved)
SECOND LOCATION 3100 6th St SW 52404 (ph 319-362-3114, opened May 2025) is a distinct business location — EXCLUDED from this single-location build
ownerResidueQuestions: Real domain, business email, GA4 measurement ID (owner will provide)
Brand assets: logo, colors, real food/storefront photos
Confirm the 3 hero value-props and any current promotion
Trust facts to reach >=6 genuine (else trust grid omits)
